use std::path::PathBuf;
use tempfile::NamedTempFile;

fn create_temp_config() -> PathBuf {
    let tmpfile = NamedTempFile::new().unwrap();
    std::fs::write(tmpfile.path(), "key=value").unwrap();
    tmpfile.path().to_path_buf()
}

fn process_and_return_path() -> PathBuf {
    let tmpfile = NamedTempFile::new().unwrap();
    std::fs::write(tmpfile.path(), b"data").unwrap();
    tmpfile.into_temp_path().keep().unwrap()
}

fn generate_report_path() -> PathBuf {
    let tmpfile = NamedTempFile::new_in("/tmp").unwrap();
    let path = tmpfile.path().to_path_buf();
    std::fs::write(&path, "report content").unwrap();
    path
}
